scope: Academic paper generation from method and result inputs.
target_standard: Top-tier academic journal or conference submission draft.

anchors.1: Fails the dimension or creates serious scientific/writing risk.
anchors.2: Partially addresses the dimension but needs major repair.
anchors.3: Serviceable draft quality with clear revision needs.
anchors.4: Strong academic draft with targeted improvements remaining.
anchors.5: Near submission-ready for a demanding venue.

dimensions.name: Task and Scope Fit
checks: The manuscript stays within the supplied method and result scope.
The document type, audience, and target venue are reflected.
The draft does not turn the task into a different paper.

dimensions.name: Contribution and Novelty Framing
checks: The central contribution is explicit, specific, and defensible.
The novelty is framed as an intellectual advance, not generic hype.
The contribution is visible in the abstract, introduction, and conclusion.

dimensions.name: Academic Storyline
checks: The paper has a clear problem-tension-solution-result arc.
The introduction motivates why the work matters now.
The narrative connects methods and results into one coherent claim.

dimensions.name: Method Fidelity
checks: The method description preserves supplied procedures, data, models, or protocols.
The draft does not invent experimental details.
The method is concrete enough for expert readers to assess validity.

dimensions.name: Results Fidelity
checks: The reported results match the supplied findings and quantitative facts.
The draft distinguishes observed results from interpretation.
The results are tied back to the research question and contribution.

dimensions.name: Structure and Coherence
checks: The manuscript has recognizable scholarly structure.
Sections have distinct jobs and do not repeat the same claims mechanically.
Transitions help readers follow the argument.

dimensions.name: Evidence Calibration and Limitations
checks: Claims are calibrated to the evidence actually supplied.
Limitations and threats to validity are acknowledged when needed.
The draft avoids unsupported universal claims and false certainty.

dimensions.name: Style and Journal Readiness
checks: The prose is precise, economical, and scholarly.
The draft avoids marketing language, filler, and vague importance claims.
The manuscript feels plausible as a serious submission draft.

blocking_issue_policy: Invented methods, datasets, metrics, or results are blockers.
Missing method or result coverage is a blocker for a full-paper generation task.
A paper with no clear contribution claim cannot score above 60 overall.
A paper that contradicts required facts cannot score above 50 overall.
